title: Bock: stronger malt
summary: Bock and Doppelbock bring more strength while staying malt-centered.

signals.title: Strength
signals.body: Expect more alcohol than everyday lagers.

signals.title: Malt
signals.body: Toffee, bread, and dark fruit can appear.

signals.title: Season
signals.body: Stronger versions fit colder months and slow meals.

signals.title: Pace
signals.body: Treat it as a sipping beer, not a quick round.
